title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at FIITJEE - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at FIITJEE - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the FIITJEE family as a Curriculum Developer in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About FIITJEE:
FIITJEE is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FIITJEE!
